title: [Completed]Scheduled Minor Patch Maintenance - July 9, 2026
author: Global MapleStory
summary: The July 9 minor patch maintenance completed at 11:55 AM PDT after updating MapleStory to v.269.3.0. All game servers were unavailable during the five-hour window, and eligible Cash Shop item durations were extended by five hours.

sections.title: Maintenance window
items: Scheduled for July 9 from 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM PDT, with all MapleStory servers unavailable.
Completion was confirmed at 11:55 AM PDT, and players were asked to restart Nexon Launcher or Steam.
Cash Shop items in player inventories were extended by five hours.

sections.title: v.269.3.0 fixes
items: The patch addressed crashes or freezes involving Receipt Damage Skin and Lynn's Whirlwind.
It corrected Beyond Burning access and reward indicators, several Erel Light and Sia Astelle event or quest issues, and item enhancement problems.
The official notice contains the complete fix list for the minor patch.
